block_03: Just like in sports, where a sportsman’s mindset accounts for more than 50% of the success, traders’ mindset and habits play a huge role in the outcome of their deals. Often, the habits that you exercise daily have more influence on your success than any strategy.
block_04: When you think about successful traders, many of them are separated from the rest only by their approach to trading and their routine. Take this time to learn about the 4 million dollar habits to pick up in the new year.
block_08: How to choose the timeframe for trading in the traderoom?
block_11: The timeframe that you choose in the traderoom should correspond to your overall trading strategy. Are you a short-term trader, making quick trades within one day? Or do you prefer to keep your trades open for a long time? This determines whether you should analyze the chart on short timeframes, or pay attention to the trend on a larger scale.
block_12: You can learn more about choosing your strategy and deciding on the appropriate timeframe from the article below. Good luck!
